issues.detail: The skill examples focus on happy paths and do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: create-proxy-session
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A does not use Browserbase SDK or the required connection method.

scenarios.name: persistent-login-context
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A does not mention Browserbase contexts or the required session reuse steps.
